subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth through the sacred and guarded Tongue; whoso readeth it shall be relieved of the burdens of earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزلت بالحق علی لسان قدس حفیظا و من یقرء ها یصیر خفیفا عن ثقل الارض
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @predictions and prophecies, @banishment to; life in Constantinople
